name: eye-friendly-font-replacer
description: Chrome/Firefox extension that replaces hard-to-read fonts with Japanese fonts. Variant-based build produces both 'default' (user-selectable fonts) and 'notosans' (Noto Sans JP + UDEV Gothic JPDOC fixed) from a single source.

scripts.build:default: node scripts/generate-icons.js default && npm run generate-css && node scripts/build-variant.js default
scripts.build:notosans: node scripts/generate-icons.js notosans && npm run generate-css && node scripts/build-variant.js notosans

author: ゆろち
